mapper.insert: insert into setmeal (category_id, name, price, status,image,create_time,update_time,create_user,update_user) values (#{categoryId},#{name},#{price},#{status},#{image},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update setmeal
category_id = #{categoryId},
name = #{name},
price = #{price},
status = #{status},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
where id = #{id}
